text:

From-To: open->closed

I just recently fixed the lines in question in 
/etc/defaults/make.conf. Please excuse me for closing the PR out from 
under another "Responsible," but I'm not sure if 'portmgr' is really a 
good used to assign too many PRs? Shouldn't this have been to 
'freebsd-ports?'
